name: Ma Lai Cake
steps: Whip the eggs in the mixer, and slowly add the sugars.
Mix for 10 mins until light and fluffy.
Sieve the dry ingredients into the egg mix and mix gently until no clumps.
Mix the wet ingredients into the egg mix until combined, rest until use.
To cook, line steam baskets with burger bun paper.
Add 80g per basket, rest for 10 mins, cook in steamer for 12 mins.
For large birthday cake, use large basket and cook 250g for 20 mins in steamer.
